---
page-layout: full
title: "Lukas Adam"
listing:
  id: sample-listings
  contents: posts
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  grid-columns: 3
---

```{=html}
<section class="home-hero">
  <div class="home-hero__content">
    <p class="eyebrow">Genomics data science • bioinformatics • machine learning</p>
    <h1>Lukas Adam</h1>
    <p class="lede">
      I am a genomics data scientist at the Roche Institute of Human Biology,
      working with bulk, single-cell, epigenetic, and spatial data.
    </p>
    <div class="home-actions" aria-label="Profile links">
      <a class="button button-primary" href="https://lukasadam.github.io/online-cv/">View CV</a>
      <a class="button button-secondary" href="mailto:gm.lukas.adam@gmail.com">Email</a>
      <a class="icon-link" href="https://github.com/lukasadam" aria-label="GitHub">
        <i class="bi bi-github" aria-hidden="true"></i>
      </a>
      <a class="icon-link" href="https://linkedin.com/in/lukas-adam" aria-label="LinkedIn">
        <i class="bi bi-linkedin" aria-hidden="true"></i>
      </a>
      <a class="icon-link" href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=jvEL1T4AAAAJ&hl=en&oi=ao" aria-label="Google Scholar">
        <i class="bi bi-mortarboard-fill" aria-hidden="true"></i>
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>
  <figure class="home-portrait">
    <img src="assets/profile.png" alt="Portrait of Lukas Adam">
  </figure>
</section>

<section class="intro-grid" aria-label="About Lukas Adam">
  <div>
    <p>
      My work sits mostly in genomics: bulk and single-cell sequencing,
      epigenetic profiling, spatial data, and the computational methods that make
      those datasets interpretable. I bring a background in bioinformatics,
      machine learning, and statistics, with earlier work spanning
      structure-based drug discovery and automated 3D imaging.
    </p>
    <p>
      This site is where I collect notes on data analysis, bioinformatics,
      software, and the occasional lesson learned while exploring the world beyond
      the lab.
    </p>
  </div>
  <div class="focus-panel">
    <h2>Current Focus</h2>
    <ul>
      <li>Bulk, single-cell, epigenetic, and spatial data</li>
      <li>Bioinformatics, machine learning, and statistical modeling</li>
      <li>Reproducible workflows for complex biological data</li>
    </ul>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="posts-section">
  <div class="section-heading">
    <p class="eyebrow">Writing</p>
    <h2>Latest Posts</h2>
  </div>
</section>
```

::: {#sample-listings}
:::
